title: pelargonium × rutaceum
intro: Pelargonium × rutaceum, also known as Rooibos tea or Red Bush tea, is a hybrid plant of the Pelargonium genus, commonly used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Rooibos tea has been shown to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-aging, and immune-boosting properties, as well as being a natural source of vitamins and minerals. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × rutaceum include tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to promote digestive health, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
